title: Simple Mapping Specification with Quality Annotation
description: A schema for defining transformations from a source CSV to one or more target CSVs, including mapping quality annotations. Transforms are specified using a combination of 'source' and 'value' fields.

source_file.description: Path to the source CSV file.

targets.description: An array of target file configurations.

output_file.description: Filename of the target CSV to generate.

mappings.description: An array of mapping rules for fields in this target file.

mappingQualityObject.description: Describes the nature and confidence of the mapping.

level.description: The assessed quality level of the mapping.

confidence.description: Confidence score for the mapping (0.0 to 1.0).

notes.description: Textual explanation regarding the mapping quality.

map.description: Key-value pairs for direct value mapping. Keys are source values, values are target values.

default_is_source.description: If true and no 'map' entry found, use the original source value as the target value.

default_literal.description: A literal default target value if no 'map' entry found and 'default_is_source' is false or absent.

name.description: Name of the other source field to check.

equals.description: Value the other field should equal.

contains.description: Substring the other field (if string) should contain.

matches_pattern.description: Regex pattern the other field (if string) should match.

if_source_is.description: Condition on the primary source field's value.

if_source_matches_pattern.description: Regex pattern for the primary source field's value.

then.description: The target value if this condition set is met.

conditions.description: List of conditions, evaluated in order. First match wins.

default_is_source.description: If true and no conditions met, use the original source value as the target value.

default_literal.description: A literal default target value if no conditions met and 'default_is_source' is false or absent.

mappingRuleObject.title: Mapping Rule
mappingRuleObject.description: Defines how a single target field is populated.

oneOf.title: Source-based Object Transformation Rule (Value Map or Conditional Logic)
Copy from Context Rule (No Source Field)

value.description: Copies a value from the processing context (e.g., 'context(file_id)'). The key is inside the parentheses.

oneOf.title: Constant Literal Value Rule (No Source Field)

value.description: A constant literal value (string, number, boolean, or null). Strings must not be 'uuid()' or match 'context(...)'.
